description: An analytical instrument is malfunctioning and giving erratic results. A lab analyst must take it out of service until it can be repaired.

nodes.task_description: Identify the instrument in the LIMS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly selects the malfunctioning instrument.

nodes.task_description: Change the instrument's status to 'Out of Service', which should prevent it from being assigned new tests.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the instrument status.

nodes.task_description: Create a maintenance request for the instrument, describing the problem.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs a new service request for the instrument with the service department or vendor.
